comment: ADR-0012 P1.2 policy_trace_refs conformance vectors. Pins builder behaviour across Py + TS for: (i) no policy events → field absent; (ii) 1 policy event → 1-element list; (iii) multiple policy events → ordered list. Vectors describe builder INPUT (event sequence) + expected OUTPUT (presence/absence + ordering of policy_trace_refs).

builder_vectors.name: no_policy_events
builder_vectors.description: Chain with only tool_call_event rows; field absent.

builder_vectors.name: one_policy_event_at_seq0
builder_vectors.description: Chain starts with one policy_check_event; refs list has 1 entry.

builder_vectors.name: mixed_chain_policy_at_seqs_1_and_3
builder_vectors.description: Chain with policy_check_event at seq 1 and 3; refs list ordered by chain seq.
